# npm audit report

postcss  <8.5.10
Severity: moderate
PostCSS has XSS via Unescaped </style> in its CSS Stringify Output - https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93
fix available via `npm audit fix --force`
Will install next@9.3.3, which is a breaking change
node_modules/next/node_modules/postcss
  next  >=9.3.4-canary.0
  Depends on vulnerable versions of postcss
  node_modules/next
    @sentry/nextjs  >=6.3.6
    Depends on vulnerable versions of next
    node_modules/@sentry/nextjs

uuid  <14.0.0
Severity: moderate
uuid: Missing buffer bounds check in v3/v5/v6 when buf is provided - https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w5hq-g745-h8pq
fix available via `npm audit fix`
node_modules/uuid
  @sentry/webpack-plugin  2.0.0-alpha.1 - 5.1.1
  Depends on vulnerable versions of uuid
  node_modules/@sentry/webpack-plugin

5 moderate severity vulnerabilities

To address issues that do not require attention, run:
  npm audit fix

To address all issues (including breaking changes), run:
  npm audit fix --force
[gitleaks] SKIP: install gitleaks or start Docker to enable secret scanning
